'''''Star Wars'' 43''' is the forty-third issue in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] arrive at [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] hoping to find refuge with Solo's old friend [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], but the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had arrived first and capture the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] tortures Solo in an effort to lure [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and then proceeds to freeze the smuggler in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] to ensure the procedure would work for his true prize, Skywalker. Meanwhile, on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] is training Luke in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] has visions of his friends in pain in Cloud City. Luke decides to try to rescue them despite Yoda's objection.

==Continuity==
This is Chapter Five of the six-part adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].

This issue includes a pinup section with illustrations of scenes from the film done by [[Terry Austin]], [[Michael Golden]], [[John Byrne]], [[Marie Severin]], and [[Frank Miller]].
